title: Infosys collaborates with Melbourne Archdiocese Catholic Schools for digital transformation using SAP platforms
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a collaboration with Melbourne Archdiocese Catholic Schools to drive a network-wide digital transformation initiative in Australia. Infosys will deploy enterprise platforms including SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP SuccessFactors, identity and access management, and master data management to move MACS' core ERP systems to the cloud and streamline operations across about 300 schools. The engagement highlights Infosys' managed services capabilities in the education sector and supports cloud-based, AI-capable ERP modernization. No contract value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: The platform is described as scalable infrastructure to support future generative AI applications aligned with MACS' strategic vision.
